## 📝 Description

What does this PR do? Reference the issue it closes (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🌍 Translation / i18n
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX polish
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / deps / CI

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guide (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I ran `dart format .` and `flutter analyze` is clean
- [ ] I added tests for new logic
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`flutter test`)
- [ ] I updated the README / docs where relevant
- [ ] I added a CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated translations if I touched user-facing strings
- [ ] No secrets / API keys / .env files were committed
- [ ] I credited myself in CONTRIBUTORS.md (optional)

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings

If this PR changes the UI, attach before/after screenshots or a screen recording.

## 🧩 Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know? Migration steps? Performance trade-offs?

---

💜 Thanks for contributing to Mino Chat!
